title: Expense Management App
description: Large open-source React Native expense management platform where I contributed bug fixes and improvements across UI, functionality, Markdown rendering, and mobile app workflows.
impact: Contributed targeted bug fixes and product improvements to a large GitHub open-source project powering cross-platform expense management, chat, payments, and accounting workflows.
responsibilities: Contributed bug fixes across the open-source Expensify React Native application.
Fixed UI issues across mobile and responsive app surfaces.
Improved application functionality in expense management and collaboration workflows.
Resolved Markdown rendering and content formatting issues.
Worked across TypeScript, JavaScript, React Native, iOS, Android, and shared app logic.
achievements: Contributed to one of the largest open-source React Native financial productivity applications on GitHub.
Improved quality and user experience through focused fixes across UI, functionality, and Markdown behavior.
Supported a cross-platform codebase serving web, iOS, Android, and desktop app experiences.
